case_title: S & C MOTORS INC. VS SPENCER, ROBERT ( BOB) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,899.00 FILED BY S & C MOTORS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, ROBERT ( BOB) WHOLESALE MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLESALE MOTORS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S & C MOTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPENCER, ROBERT ( BOB) WHOLESALE MOTORS $3,899.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,994.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, ROBERT ( BOB) WHOLESALE MOTORS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ROBERT SPENCER RETURNED REFUSED.
